description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle of lotion with a predominantly deep purple label and a white cap. The front of the bottle displays the brand 'Complete Hemp' and the product name 'Collagen Booster Serum CBD' in bold, clear lettering. The label is densely covered with text, including product information, directions, and ingredients, wrapping around the entire bottle. The cap is smooth, opaque, and contrasts with the richly colored body. The bottle appears to be made of plastic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A cylindrical, purple-labeled lotion bottle with a white cap and dense product information wrapping around its glossy plastic surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand, product name, and main label details on a purple background with a white cap.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying dense white text with product information and symbols on the purple label, cap remains plain white.
description_view_2: Side-rear view with more product details and regulatory icons visible, label text continues around the bottle.
description_view_3: Side view showing additional label text and a QR code area, with the cap and label design consistent throughout.
